api-integrations.title: API Integrations
api-integrations.description: API Integrations let administrators issue scoped keys for trusted external systems. A key can be limited by API zone and HTTP method, so an integration can be granted only the surface it actually needs.

authentication/auth-v1.title: Authentication v1
authentication/auth-v1.description: Legacy session-based authentication with cookie refresh tokens.

authentication/auth-v2.title: Authentication v2
authentication/auth-v2.description: The v2 auth flow supports WebAuthn trusted devices and Microsoft SSO alongside traditional password login.

authentication/trusted-devices.title: Trusted Devices
authentication/trusted-devices.description: WebAuthn-based trusted device registration and management for passwordless authentication.

chat/chat.title: System Chat
chat/chat.description: Real-time messaging system with personal, group, and team conversations. All endpoints require authentication and are restricted to ADMIN, TECHNICIAN, and SUPER_ADMIN roles.

chat/websockets.title: WebSockets
chat/websockets.description: Real-time communication via Socket.IO for notifications, chat, and live ticket updates.

intro.title: TSTS API Documentation
intro.description: The TSTS API is a RESTful service built with Express.js, TypeORM, and PostgreSQL that powers a comprehensive Ticketing & Service Tracking System. It manages tickets, users, groups, knowledge base, chat, notifications, reporting, and AI-assisted support.

management/academic-structure.title: Academic Structure
management/academic-structure.description: Universities, domains, departments, and specializations form the organizational hierarchy.

management/ai-assistant.title: AI Assistant
management/ai-assistant.description: Powered by Ollama (Llama 3.2), the AI assistant provides conversational support and automated ticket creation.

management/audit-logs.title: Audit Logs
management/audit-logs.description: Comprehensive audit trail for all system activities.

management/custom-forms.title: Custom Forms
management/custom-forms.description: Dynamic form builder with public submission support and response export.

management/desktop-app.title: Desktop App
management/desktop-app.description: Endpoints supporting the TSTS Electron desktop application for requesters.

management/groups.title: Groups
management/groups.description: Organize technicians into functional support groups.

management/knowledge-base.title: Knowledge Base
management/knowledge-base.description: Self-service articles that can be generated from final reports using AI.

management/lookups.title: Lookups
management/lookups.description: Lookup endpoints provide lightweight reference data for dropdowns, filters, and autocomplete fields.

management/notifications.title: Notifications
management/notifications.description: Real-time notification system with read tracking, bulk operations, and broadcast support.

management/permission-profiles.title: Permission Profiles
management/permission-profiles.description: Assign granular permission sets to users via profiles.

management/problems.title: Problems
management/problems.description: Problem types are linked to specializations and are used to categorize tickets.

management/recycle-bin.title: Recycle Bin
management/recycle-bin.description: Soft-deleted entities can be listed and restored.

management/site-settings.title: Site Settings
management/site-settings.description: Global system configuration including branding and email domain restrictions.

management/sla.title: SLA Rules
management/sla.description: Service Level Agreement rules define response and resolution time targets.

management/work-hours.title: Work Hours
management/work-hours.description: Define working hours for scheduling and SLA calculations.

reports/reports.title: Reports
reports/reports.description: Report generation and dashboard analytics. All endpoints require authentication.

tickets/ticket-chat.title: Ticket Chat
tickets/ticket-chat.description: Internal chat within a ticket context. Messages can have file attachments.

tickets/ticket-final-report.title: Final Reports
tickets/ticket-final-report.description: Final reports document the resolution of a ticket. They can include media attachments and can be used as a source for AI-generated knowledge base articles.

tickets/ticket-media.title: Ticket Media
tickets/ticket-media.description: File attachments for tickets and final reports. Stored in MinIO (S3-compatible).

tickets/ticket-reviews.title: Ticket Reviews
tickets/ticket-reviews.description: Requesters can review tickets after resolution.

tickets/tickets.title: Tickets
tickets/tickets.description: The core entity of the system. Tickets support full lifecycle management, file attachments, chat-based communication, reviews, analytics, and final reports.

users/user-profile.title: User Profile
users/user-profile.description: Authenticated users can view and manage their own profiles.

users/users.title: Users
users/users.description: The system manages three user types: Requesters, Technicians, and Admins (including Super Admins).
